warnings: ABMD 2022-12-22 merger models only the guaranteed $380/share cash leg; one non-tradeable CVR per share (up to $35 contingent cash) is marked at $0 under the as-of-2026-07-15 lower-bound policy, so returns may be understated; J&J still reported about $0.4bn of aggregate ABMD CVR liability at 2025 year-end, so $0 is not a fair-value estimate.
